name: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
description: Design an algorithm to serialize and deserialize a binary tree. Serialization is the process of converting a data structure into a sequence of bits. Deserialization is the reverse process. There is no restriction on how your serialization/deserialization algorithm should work.
tests:
def test_basic():
    codec = Codec()
    root = TreeNode(1, TreeNode(2), TreeNode(3, TreeNode(4), TreeNode(5)))
    result = codec.deserialize(codec.serialize(root))
    assert result.val == 1
    assert result.left.val == 2
    assert result.right.val == 3

def test_empty():
    codec = Codec()
    result = codec.deserialize(codec.serialize(None))
    assert result is None

def test_single():
    codec = Codec()
    root = TreeNode(1)
    result = codec.deserialize(codec.serialize(root))
    assert result.val == 1
    assert result.left is None
    assert result.right is None

def test_left_only():
    codec = Codec()
    root = TreeNode(1, TreeNode(2, TreeNode(3)))
    result = codec.deserialize(codec.serialize(root))
    assert result.left.left.val == 3
constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 10^4]
